services.services_subtitle: AI tools that actually work, powered by Rust 🦀

rust_training.title: Rust Adoption & Training
rust_training.description: We help your team adopt Rust for new applications or migrate existing systems. From initial assessment to hands-on training, we guide companies through their complete Rust transformation.
rust_training.benefit1: Assess which projects benefit most from Rust adoption
rust_training.benefit2: Plan migration strategies for existing applications
rust_training.benefit3: Train your team with hands-on, tailored guidance

llm_integration.title: LLM Integration
llm_integration.description: Seamlessly connect large language models (LLMs) to your applications for enhanced automation, chatbots, and data processing. Custom solutions designed to integrate with your existing systems, ensuring scalability and performance.
llm_integration.benefit1: Integrate leading LLMs into your existing products
llm_integration.benefit2: Build custom knowledge bases for domain-specific applications
llm_integration.benefit4: Create robust evaluation systems for LLM outputs

chatbot.title: Chatbot Development
chatbot.description: Transform your apps with intelligent chatbots. From simple Q&A interfaces to complex conversational systems.
chatbot.benefit1: Transform any app into a conversational interface
chatbot.benefit2: Connect chatbots directly to your existing APIs
chatbot.benefit3: Handle complex user queries in natural language
chatbot.benefit4: Reduce support load with automated responses

api0.title: api0.ai — MCP Gateway
api0.description: An MCP gateway that turns your APIs into tools for AI agents. Connect any endpoint, define capabilities, and let LLMs orchestrate workflows — no glue code needed.
api0.benefit1: Expose any API as an MCP tool for AI agents
api0.benefit2: Build multi-step agent workflows with zero glue code
api0.benefit3: Secure API key management with domain restrictions

about.hero_subtitle: 2 live AI tools + 1 MVP. All powered by our Rust + AI tech
about.description1: Based in Switzerland, we build AI tools that actually work. Our live portfolio: API0.AI, cVenom, and Solanize (MVP).
about.description2: Rather than promising, we deliver. Our tools are live, testable, and powered by our homegrown Rust + AI stack.
about.description3: Our work combines technical expertise with concrete results. 2 live tools + 1 MVP under heavy development.
about.description4: Operating proudly from the heart of Switzerland, we bring precision and reliability to every project.

simplicity.title: Simplicity

about.project_subtitle: The easiest way to make your APIs accessible to AI agents
about.project_description1: api0.ai is a bridge that connects AI agents to your existing APIs — no SDK, no glue code. Just point it at your endpoints and let any AI agent call them securely.
about.project_description2: Built with Rust for speed and reliability, api0.ai makes it simple for businesses to let AI agents interact with their own infrastructure — with minimal setup and enterprise-grade security.
about.cta_description: Let's discuss how our live AI tools can power your business.
